title: User Delivery Addresses Management
description: Implement user profile delivery addresses with CRUD API
requirements: Create DeliveryAddress model: user_id, name (label like 'Другу'), recipient_name, recipient_phone, address_type (home/pickup), full_address, city, postal_code, provider (cdek/pochta/ozon/wb), pickup_point_code, is_default, created_at, updated_at
Extend UserProfile model: default_phone, default_recipient_name (fallback if no address)
API endpoints: GET /users/me/addresses, POST /users/me/addresses, PATCH /users/me/addresses/{id}, DELETE /users/me/addresses/{id}, POST /users/me/addresses/{id}/set-default
Validation: phone format, required fields per address_type
Migration: add delivery_addresses table, extend users table
Repository pattern: DeliveryAddressRepository with async methods
Service layer: DeliveryAddressService with business logic (default address selection)
acceptance_criteria: User can create multiple delivery addresses with custom labels
One address can be marked as default
API returns addresses sorted by is_default DESC, created_at DESC
Validation prevents duplicate default addresses per user
